## Render evidence

<!-- UI PRs must include actual implementation renders. -->

### Desktop

- [ ] Canonical states attached
- [ ] Loading/empty/blocked/failed states attached

### Mobile

- [ ] Core states attached
- [ ] Ask and Detail behavior attached

### Optional

- [ ] Interaction recording
- [ ] Playwright trace
- [ ] Visual diff

## Product integrity checks

- [ ] Centre prompt and Ask share one durable thread
- [ ] One recommendation shown by default
- [ ] Alternatives remain subordinate
- [ ] No stage bar before construction acceptance
- [ ] No silent state mutation
- [ ] Exact change diff before apply
- [ ] Preview is bounded and honest
- [ ] Warnings are not collapsed into pass
- [ ] Approval precedes write effects
- [ ] Registration has manifest/revision proof
- [ ] Unsupported capabilities are explicit
